generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical actuator controlling vehicle propulsion via motor signals transmitted through the Data Collection and Device Control Entity using ROS2 command dissemination and Wi-Fi network communication."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical actuator controlling vehicle steering via servo signals transmitted through the Data Collection and Device Control Entity using ROS2 command dissemination and Wi-Fi network communication."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor providing object tracking and environmental mapping for the autonomous vehicle's cyber-physical system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelRealsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard Intel RealSense D435i depth camera providing vehicle state estimation and spatial awareness through depth measurements."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data transmitted from LiDAR sensor to Data Pre-Processing Functional Entity for clustering and tracking conversion."
]

instance DepthCameraStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealsenseD435iDepthCamera
    base:desc "Raw depth camera data transmitted from Intel RealSense D435i for vehicle state estimation and spatial awareness processing."
]

instance VehicleStateMetrics : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealsenseD435iDepthCamera
    base:desc "Vehicle state metrics (speed, acceleration) transmitted from depth camera processing for ACC system integration."
]

instance MotorActuationSignals : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataCollectionAndDeviceControlEntity
    base:desc "Motor actuation signals transmitted from Data Collection Entity to Physical Twin Entity for vehicle propulsion control."
]

instance SteeringServoInputs : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataCollectionAndDeviceControlEntity
    base:desc "Steering servo input commands transmitted from Data Collection Entity to Physical Twin Entity for vehicle direction control."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance ObjectTrackModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital model representing clustered and tracked objects derived from LiDAR point clouds processed by the Data Pre-Processing Functional Entity."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingComponent
]

instance DrivingPathProjectionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital model projecting driving paths based on processed LiDAR data and vehicle state metrics for ACC system planning."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PathProjectionComponent
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured vehicle state data including speed, acceleration, and inter-vehicle distance derived from sensor preprocessing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateMetrics
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeStateTrackingService
]

instance ProcessedLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR data containing object tracks and driving path projections after clustering and tracking preprocessing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

instance TelemetryStreamData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "ROS2-based telemetry stream data for real-time visualization of vehicle dynamics in MATLAB/Simulink dashboards or Python scripts."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeVisualizationComponent
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataPreProcessingFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional entity performing real-time preprocessing of raw LiDAR point clouds through clustering and tracking to convert 2D plane representations into actionable object tracks and driving path projections."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingService
]

instance DataTranslationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional entity responsible for serialization and unit conversion to ensure compatibility across ROS2-based software components in the Digital Twin System."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataSerializationService
]

instance ROS2NetworkCommunication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based network communication infrastructure facilitating intra-system data exchange between functional entities with real-time processing constraints."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataExchangeService
]

instance WiFiUDPTransport : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi network with UDP transport protocol enabling inter-entity communication between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin Entity for low-latency data transmission."
    DTDFVocab:enables InterEntityCommunicationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Low-power, high-performance microcomputer enabling edge computing for real-time processing of sensor data and ACC computations with 100ms latency constraints."
    DTDFVocab:enables EdgeComputingService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkIntegration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Integration of MATLAB/Simulink for control system design, real-time simulation, and co-simulation of physical and digital models in the Digital Twin System."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationAndCoSimulationService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software component dedicated to clustering and tracking of LiDAR point clouds within the Data Pre-Processing Functional Entity to generate object tracks and driving path projections."
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance PathProjectionComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component responsible for projecting driving paths based on processed LiDAR data and vehicle state metrics for ACC system planning."
    DTDFVocab:enables PathPlanningService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional entity providing 3D visualization of processed data (vehicle state, object tracks) for immediate validation of sensor-derived inputs with real-time latency constraints."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeStateTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring service providing real-time updates of vehicle state variables (speed, acceleration, inter-vehicle distance) with 100ms latency for ACC decision-making."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight
]

instance EdgeAwareACCProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Distributed computing service offloading high-complexity computations (sensor fusion, trajectory optimization) from Jetson Orin Nano to cloud/edge servers using ROS2 remapping while maintaining real-time constraints."
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationOffloadingAction
]

instance DynamicACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge-based service enabling real-time reconfiguration of ACC parameters (minimum following distance, deceleration thresholds) via ROS2 services or REST APIs with 500ms RTT constraints."
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicControlAction
]

instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service converting raw LiDAR point clouds into actionable object tracks and driving path projections through clustering and tracking algorithms within the Data Pre-Processing Functional Entity."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackingInsight
]

instance DataSerializationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service ensuring serialization and unit conversion compatibility across ROS2-based software components in the Digital Twin System."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataCompatibilityInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service facilitating intra-system data exchange between functional entities using ROS2 network communication with real-time processing constraints."
    DTDFVocab:provides NetworkCommunicationInsight
]

instance InterEntityCommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling inter-entity communication between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin Entity via Wi-Fi with UDP transport for low-latency data transmission."
    DTDFVocab:provides InterEntityCommunicationInsight
]

instance EdgeComputingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling edge computing capabilities on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for real-time processing of sensor data and ACC computations with 100ms latency."
    DTDFVocab:provides EdgeProcessingInsight
]

instance SimulationAndCoSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service integrating MATLAB/Simulink for control system design, real-time simulation, and co-simulation of physical and digital models in the Digital Twin System."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing 3D visualization of processed data (vehicle state, object tracks) for immediate validation of sensor-derived inputs with real-time latency constraints."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance PathPlanningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service projecting driving paths based on processed LiDAR data and vehicle state metrics for ACC system planning."
    DTDFVocab:provides PathPlanningInsight
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing object tracking insights from processed LiDAR data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackingInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insight into vehicle state variables (speed, acceleration, inter-vehicle distance) for ACC decision-making with 100ms latency."
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into clustered and tracked objects derived from processed LiDAR point clouds for environmental awareness in ACC system."
]

instance ComputationOffloadingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action offloading high-complexity computations from edge device to cloud/edge servers using ROS2 remapping while maintaining real-time constraints."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DynamicControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action enabling real-time reconfiguration of ACC parameters (minimum following distance, deceleration thresholds) via ROS2 services or REST APIs."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataCompatibilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into serialized and unit-converted data ensuring compatibility across ROS2-based software components in the Digital Twin System."
]

instance NetworkCommunicationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into intra-system data exchange facilitated by ROS2 network communication with real-time processing constraints."
]

instance InterEntityCommunicationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into inter-entity communication between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin Entity via Wi-Fi with UDP transport for low-latency data transmission."
]

instance EdgeProcessingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into edge computing capabilities on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for real-time processing of sensor data and ACC computations."
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into MATLAB/Simulink integration for control system design, real-time simulation, and co-simulation of physical and digital models."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into 3D visualization of processed data (vehicle state, object tracks) for immediate validation of sensor-derived inputs."
]

instance PathPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into driving paths projected based on processed LiDAR data and vehicle state metrics for ACC system planning."
]

// C12: Entities
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Primary environment hosting physical sensors, actuators, and compute resources for the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle, consolidating resource-specific functionality including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking."
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelRealsenseD435iDepthCamera, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, DataCollectionAndDeviceControlEntity
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Entity managing data management and control mechanisms for the Digital Twin System, including preprocessing, visualization, and ACC computation offloading capabilities."
    base:contains DataPreProcessingFunctionalEntity, DataTranslationFunctionalEntity, ROS2NetworkCommunication, WiFiUDPTransport, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, MATLABSimulinkIntegration
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Entity subdivided into 3D Visualization and Control Panel components, providing interfaces for engineers, fleet managers, and autonomous driving researchers to interact with the Digital Twin System."
    base:contains RealTimeVisualizationComponent, ControlPanelComponent
]

instance DataCollectionAndDeviceControlEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Functional entity responsible for collecting raw measurements from sensors and executing remote control commands to actuators, interfacing between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin Entity via Wi-Fi network."
    base:contains MotorActuationSignals, SteeringServoInputs
]

instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Component of User Entity providing interfaces for remote management of ACC parameters, emergency overrides, and braking interventions via ROS2 services or REST APIs."
    base:contains DynamicACCControlService
]

// C13: Relationships between Entities
instance EntityCommunicationRelationship : DTDFVocab:Relationship [
    base:desc "ROS2-based inter-node communication coordinating between Physical Twin Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity with no explicit hierarchical dependencies."
    DTDFVocab:relates PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "
The **virtual-to-physical interaction** in this DTS is governed by the *Controlling FE* (ACC - Adaptive Cruise Control) and *Actuation FE*, which execute commands derived from digital twin logic. **Command types** include **emergency braking** and **modifying the desired speed** (R5), transmitted via the *Data Translation* component as serialized messages. **Control message formats** are standardized through ROS2 QoS policies (implied by system design) and inter-entity communication over Wi-Fi. **Validation and authentication mechanisms** are not explicitly documented, though the *Data Translation* component ensures message alignment and unit consistency. **Feedback systems** are not described, but the system relies on **closed-loop control** where the *Actuation FE* converts desired speed commands into **motor voltage commands** (Table I). **Conflict resolution** is not addressed in the documents, and **command execution confirmation** is not specified beyond the actuation process itself."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin System (DTS) enforces a **100 ms clock synchronization accuracy** between physical and digital components due to hardware limitations, ensuring precise temporal alignment for computation offloading and coordination. Network latency is constrained to **at most 100 ms** from the vehicle to the Digital Twin Entity (DTE) to maintain real-time responsiveness. The system adheres to this temporal granularity to support safety-critical vehicular applications, where stricter standards (e.g., <100 ms) are mandated elsewhere but not explicitly implemented here. No explicit mention of service-specific time scales or sub-millisecond requirements is provided in the documents."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adopts an **ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA)-inspired design**, where Functional Entities (FEs) are mapped to ROS2 packages, each containing one or more ROS2 nodes. The architecture emphasizes **entity-based decomposition** with explicit hardware partitioning: the *Physical Twin Entity* (sensors/actuators/compute), *Digital Twin Entity* (data management/control), and *User Entity* (visualization/control). Resource management is implicitly tied to hardware deployment, as each entity operates on distinct hardware, enabling parallel execution. No explicit mention of topic-based or service-based communication patterns, QoS policies, or system-wide orchestration frameworks (e.g., Kubernetes, edge orchestration) is provided. The system’s coordination relies on ROS2’s native inter-node communication within the defined entities."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system emphasizes **real-time synchronization** with a **network latency requirement of at most 100 ms** and **clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms** to ensure temporal consistency between physical and digital representations. The architecture does not explicitly detail **model fidelity metrics**, **validation methods**, or **uncertainty quantification**, nor does it reference standards like **IEC 61508** or **IEC 62264**. Instead, fidelity is implicitly ensured through **ROS2/Wi-Fi-enabled low-latency communication** and **entity-based decomposition** per ISO 23247. No mention of **Monte Carlo simulations**, **Bayesian methods**, or **code reviews** is present in the provided documents."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "
The **technical network infrastructure** of this DTS is designed for **low-latency, distributed communication** between Physical Twin Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. **Communication protocols** include **ROS2** for intra-system SW component interaction (e.g., between Data Pre-Processing FE, Controlling FE, and Actuation FE) and **Wi-Fi with UDP transport** (partially referenced) for inter-entity communication. **Network topology** follows a **distributed architecture**, with computational tasks offloaded to specialized hardware (e.g., NVIDIA Jetson for point cloud processing). **Latency requirements** are strictly constrained to **at most 100 ms** due to hardware limitations, ensuring real-time responsiveness for ACC functionalities. **Bandwidth and reliability mechanisms** are not explicitly quantified, but the system’s reliance on **real-time visualization** and **object tracking** implies sufficient throughput for high-resolution LiDAR data streams. **Security protocols** are not mentioned, though the use of **Wi-Fi** suggests potential vulnerabilities that are not addressed in the provided documents. **Redundancy mechanisms** are not documented, but the system’s critical nature (e.g., autonomous driving) may implicitly require failover strategies for network disruptions.
"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "
The **deployment infrastructure** of this DTS leverages a **distributed, edge-centric architecture** with specialized hardware for computational offloading. **Hosting platforms** include **on-premise NVIDIA Jetson devices** for the Physical Twin Entity (handling LiDAR processing and actuation) and **external data storage** for object tracks and vehicle state data. **Computational requirements** are not explicitly detailed, but the system’s reliance on **point cloud clustering and tracking** suggests significant processing demands (e.g., handling LiDAR scans with high point densities). **Scalability mechanisms** are implied through the modular design of SW components (e.g., Data Translation FE, Controlling FE), which can be independently scaled based on workload. **Deployment models** are not specified beyond the distributed setup, though the mention of **ROS2** suggests compatibility with containerized or microservices-based deployments. **Availability/reliability assurance** is not addressed, but the **100 ms latency requirement** indicates a need for high-availability hardware and network infrastructure. **Edge-only deployment** is inferred from the use of Jetson devices, but cloud integration is not mentioned.
"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to the **ISO 23247 – Digital Twin Framework for Manufacturing**, a four-part standard published in 2021. Part 2 of the standard defines a **reference architecture (RA)** based on an **entity-based model**, where functionality is distributed across four primary entities: **Observable Manufacturing Elements (OMEs)**, **Data Collection and Device Control Entities**, **Digital Twin Entities (DTEs)**, and **User Entities**. Each entity is further decomposed into **Functional Entities (FEs)**, enabling modular implementation. The standard does not mandate a specific interoperability protocol but provides **OPC Unified Architecture (UA)** as an example implementation choice for interfacing FEs with OMEs or user interfaces. While ISO 23247 establishes a **compliance framework** for Digital Twin development in manufacturing, it does not detail **certification requirements** or **conformity assessment procedures**. The standard focuses on **structural and functional interoperability** rather than regulatory compliance or industry-specific certifications."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "
The provided documents reference **safety-critical considerations** for an **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) system** within the context of **ISO 15622:2018** [35], which outlines performance requirements and test procedures for intelligent transport systems. While no explicit mention of **ISO 26262** (functional safety for road vehicles) or **FMEA (Failure Mode and Effects Analysis)** is made, the system's **safety-critical nature** is implied through its reliance on **real-time control mechanisms** and **latency-sensitive operations** (as referenced in **3GPP TS 22.185 [36]**, which specifies **V2X (Vehicle-to-Everything) service requirements** with strict **latency constraints**—e.g., **<100ms** for safety-critical communications).

The **model-driven architecture for interactive digital twin cockpits** [37] emphasizes **safety assurance** through **interactive validation**, but does not detail specific **cybersecurity protocols** (e.g., encryption, access control) or **threat mitigation strategies**. The documents do not provide evidence of **authentication systems**, **fail-safe mechanisms**, or **risk assessment methodologies** beyond the implicit need for **deterministic performance** in safety-critical applications. **No explicit compliance frameworks** (e.g., ISO 26262, IEC 62443) or **data protection regulations** (e.g., GDPR) are mentioned in the provided context."
]
